summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CA.OS theme redesign from dark navy Swiss Vault to light professional indigo theme. Backend remains fully functional (20/20 API tests passed). Frontend successfully redesigned with indigo color scheme, white sidebar, mobile bottom tab navigation, and professional appearance. All core features working correctly including login, navigation, CRUD operations, and responsive design.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor overlay clicking issue on mobile bottom navigation - 'Made with Emergent' badge intercepting some clicks

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing DialogContent descriptions (accessibility)

passed_tests: Backend: All 20 API endpoints passing (login, dashboard stats, employee/task/client/query CRUD, attendance, leaves, notifications)
Frontend: Login flow with admin@caos.com/admin123 redirects to dashboard successfully
Frontend: Dashboard loads with indigo theme, stats cards with colored left border accents, recent tasks table, weekly attendance chart
Frontend: White sidebar with indigo active states working correctly on desktop
Frontend: All navigation links functional (Dashboard, Tasks, Attendance, Leaves, Clients, Queries, Employees)
Frontend: Create dialogs working for Employee and Task creation
Frontend: Clock-in/out buttons correctly hidden for admin role (proper role-based behavior)
Frontend: All major pages load correctly (Attendance, Leaves, Clients, Queries)
Frontend: Notification system with badge count working
Frontend: Indigo color scheme properly implemented (bg-indigo-600 buttons, indigo accents throughout)
Frontend: Mobile responsiveness working - desktop sidebar hidden, bottom tab navigation present
Frontend: Mobile card views implemented for tables
Frontend: Theme consistency maintained across desktop and mobile
Frontend: Professional indigo appearance successfully replaces dark navy theme
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor overlay issue on mobile navigation - consider adjusting z-index of bottom navigation or 'Made with Emergent' badge positioning to prevent click interception. Otherwise the redesign is excellent.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (20/20), Frontend: 95% (18/19 - minor mobile overlay issue)
